title: RGB ENCHANTMENT XP BAR
description: This resource pack turns your boring old XP Bar into a RGB XP Bar that looks like the enchantment language.
body:
This mod will change the original XP Bar on Minecraft into a RGB XP Bar that looks like the enchantment language.

I made this mod because i like the [Enchanted](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xp-bar-to-enchantment-text) XP Bar by [TristanFour](https://modrinth.com/user/TristanFour), but i kinda want it to be Rainbow, cuz... idk, it's cool... ig. 

Alright Enjoy
